properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY BY M/V RAMFORM VANGUARD TOWING 12
   7000 METER LONG CABLES:
   A. IN PROGRESS ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      35-57.77S 051-09.78W AND 35-29.35S 051-10.27W.
   B. 10 AND 11 JUN ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      35-19.62S 051-24.65W AND 35-39.63S 052-26.98W.
   C. 11 AND 12 JUN ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
      34-36.32S 052-20.65W AND 35-16.25S 051-18.30W.
   NINE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 1374/13.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 13 JUN 13.
